prompt: Use $story-cards-item to create item cards from role exclusive hooks, scene rules, and a list of weapons, clues, relics, and key objects.
expected: Routes to item cards, loads CONTEXT and type packages, writes narrative_functions, ownership_links, usage_rules, costs, exclusive_fit, and upstream_trace.

prompt: Use $story-cards-item to repair an important object that has a name and appearance but no owner, activation rule, or cost.
expected: Routes to N2-FUNCTION and N3-COST, closes ownership, usage, and costs, and rejects decorative-only object closure.

prompt: Use $story-cards-item to audit whether exclusive items really consume character hooks and scene constraints.
expected: Checks exclusive_fit and upstream_trace, reports owner or fit drift, and maps repair to N4-FIT when upstream interfaces are missing.
